title: Apple Vision Pro exec is reportedly leaving for OpenAI
description: Paul Meade, the Apple vice president in charge of the Vision Pro headset, is reportedly leaving the company to join OpenAI’s hardware team.

title: The fittest founder in the room got cancer. Here’s how he used AI to fight back.
description: When confronted with cancer, Connor Christou fed everything tied tied to his regime — blood results, scan data, wearable output, journal entries — into Claude.

title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like  models as Anthropic’s export ban drags on
description: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban. U.S. AI labs may never recover this enormous market.

title: Prompt: Physical AI Is Entering Its Commercialization Phase
description: Investment, safety and next-generation AI models suggest the conversation is shifting from robot demonstrations to real-world deployment.

title: India to Get Another Big AI Funding Boost From Amazon
description: Other tech giants have also planned multi-billion-dollar AI investments in the large and fast-growing Indian AI market.

title: How AI Could Help Address the Energy Challenge it is Creating
description: Data center company executives say AI can support energy transition goals while managing the technology’s growing power demands.

title: Maker of Digit the Robot to Go Public
description: A wave of public offerings is rippling through robotics, AI and the larger tech industry.

title: Lawmakers spar over payment rails
description: House members on Wednesday debated the Payments Access and Consumer Efficiency Act, which would expand Federal Reserve services access.

title: The emergence of the web data infrastructure layer for AI
description: AI is booming. New use cases are emerging each day. To capitalize on the technology’s potential, enterprises require data at scale. In many cases, though, the relevant information is blocked or unstructured, which limits its use by AI models.  To understand this challenge, consider the foundation of the web itself. The web was not designed…

title: CRM compliance: What it is and how to nail It with your team & tech
description: A CRM is like a teenager’s journal – full of sensitive information. But instead of school stories and secrets, it holds contact records, purchase history, support conversations, and for some, health information or payment data, too.

title: Why the Frontier Ecosystem must be Open — Matei Zaharia and Reynold Xin, Databricks
description: In a rare double-interview, the Databricks technical leaders riff on what it will take for every company to build Agent Clouds

title: [AINews] Claude Tag: Multiplayer, Proactive, Persistent Agents in Slack
description: Claude finally gets a Slackbot upgrade

title: The fuel of the future is already here: Why TRISO matters
description: Millimeter-scale particles of nuclear-reactor fuel are encased in four layers of different materials that act as a “miniature containment system”.

title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
description: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

title: The Designer’s AI Glossary: Familiar Words, New Meanings
description: These terms help designers navigate the shift from interfaces to intelligent systems.
